tasks.task_goal: Flatten pie dough to an even thickness for a crust
tasks.expected_outcome: Dough is uniformly flattened to the desired thickness without tearing
required_tool_attributes: smooth cylindrical surface for continuous rotational contact
rigid structure to maintain shape under pressure
low-friction rotation relative to hands or handles
sufficient mass to aid rolling with reduced sliding
unconventional_tools: wine bottle
straight-sided drinking glass
stainless steel water bottle (filled)
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, or compressible body that deforms under pressure
irregular, non-cylindrical, or textured surface that prevents smooth continuous contact
fixed or high-friction interface with hands that prevents low-friction rotation

tasks.task_goal: Apply an even coat of paint to a living room wall
tasks.expected_outcome: The wall is uniformly covered with paint without streaks or brush marks
required_tool_attributes: cylindrical nap sleeve to enable rolling application
low-friction axle or cage bearings for smooth rotation
rigid frame to transmit torque
absorbent nap with appropriate pile height for paint loading
unconventional_tools: Kitchen rolling pin wrapped in a microfiber towel (secured with rubber bands)
Lint roller handle fitted with a terry-cloth sock sleeve
Pool noodle mounted on a broom/dowel axle and covered with a fleece or microfiber sleeve
opposite_tool_attributes: flat or irregular, non-cylindrical contact surface that cannot roll
seized/high-friction axle or no bearings that prevent smooth rotation
non-absorbent, slick surface with no nap/pile to load paint

tasks.task_goal: Move a heavy refrigerator across the kitchen
tasks.expected_outcome: The refrigerator is relocated safely with minimal effort and floor damage
required_tool_attributes: round wheels with low rolling resistance
robust axle alignment for stable rotation
high load-bearing capacity
treaded tires for traction on various floor types
unconventional_tools: two sturdy skateboards topped with a plywood sheet as a makeshift dolly
heavy-duty garden wagon or yard cart with pneumatic treaded tires
large wheeled garbage bin (wheelie bin) used as a tilted dolly
opposite_tool_attributes: square or irregular wheels with high rolling resistance
bent/misaligned axles that wobble and bind
low load-bearing structure that collapses under heavy weight

tasks.task_goal: Level freshly laid sod on a backyard lawn
tasks.expected_outcome: Sod is firmly pressed into contact with soil, leaving a smooth, even surface
required_tool_attributes: large cylindrical drum for broad rotational contact
smooth surface to prevent gouging
fillable ballast (water/sand) for adjustable mass
low-friction bearings on the drum axle
unconventional_tools: barrel-style compost tumbler
55-gallon plastic rain barrel
stainless steel beer keg
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, non-cylindrical or irregular contact surface (no broad rotational contact)
rough, serrated, or spiked surface that gouges the turf
non-fillable, ultra-light or soft body with no adjustable ballast and high-friction/no axle bearings

tasks.task_goal: Remove pet hair from a wool coat
tasks.expected_outcome: Loose hair and lint are lifted off the coat without damaging the fabric
required_tool_attributes: freely rotating cylindrical core
tacky surface to pick up fibers during rolling
ergonomic handle to apply light pressure
rigid core to prevent deformation
unconventional_tools: mini paint roller wrapped with painter's or masking tape (sticky side out)
ball-bearing rolling pin wrapped with packing tape (sticky side out)
muscle massage roller stick with rotating segments wrapped in double-sided tape
opposite_tool_attributes: fixed, non-rotating flat pad instead of a freely rotating cylindrical core
smooth, low-friction, non-adhesive surface that repels fibers rather than grabbing them
flexible, collapsible core without an ergonomic handle, preventing controlled pressure

tasks.task_goal: Encapsulate a poster in clear laminate for protection
tasks.expected_outcome: Poster is sealed in laminate with no bubbles or wrinkles
required_tool_attributes: paired parallel rollers for continuous feed
low-friction, heat-resistant roller surfaces
consistent nip pressure across the roller width
driven rotation for steady, uniform movement
unconventional_tools: hand-crank pasta maker (dough sheeter)
old-fashioned laundry wringer (mangle)
hand-cranked craft die-cutting/embossing machine
opposite_tool_attributes: single, non-rotating platen or misaligned/non-parallel contact surfaces (no paired parallel rollers for continuous feed)
high-friction, heat-sensitive or sticky contact surfaces that deform/melt under heat
uneven or no nip pressure across the width with undriven/free-spinning motion causing jerky, non-uniform feed

tasks.task_goal: Move packed cartons from packing station to staging area without lifting
tasks.expected_outcome: Boxes glide smoothly along the line to the staging area with controlled speed
required_tool_attributes: multiple low-friction cylindrical rollers
precision bearings to minimize sliding
rigid frame for roller alignment
consistent roller diameter for even motion
unconventional_tools: PVC pipe sections used as rollers within a metal rain gutter or U-channel
Several kitchen rolling pins laid side-by-side in a simple frame
A row of empty aluminum cans acting as rollers inside a shallow tray
opposite_tool_attributes: single high-friction flat surface with no bearings, causing sliding instead of rolling
flexible, sagging frame that misaligns supports and allows deflection
irregular or non-cylindrical supports with varying diameters that create jamming and uneven motion

tasks.task_goal: Thin sheets of pasta to the final thickness for fettuccine
tasks.expected_outcome: Pasta sheets are evenly thinned and emerge smooth and uniform
required_tool_attributes: parallel steel rollers with adjustable gap
smooth cylindrical surfaces to prevent sticking
crank-driven rotation for controlled feed
stable bearings for consistent rolling pressure
unconventional_tools: hand-cranked clothes wringer (laundry mangle)
polymer clay conditioning machine
office thermal laminator
opposite_tool_attributes: non-parallel rollers with a fixed or uneven gap (no adjustability)
rough, sticky, serrated, or porous contact surfaces instead of smooth cylinders
no controlled rotational feed and loose, wobbly bearings causing inconsistent pressure

tasks.task_goal: Press down wallpaper seams after hanging
tasks.expected_outcome: Seams lie flat and adhere without visible ridges or bubbles
required_tool_attributes: narrow, smooth cylindrical wheel
slightly rounded edges to avoid cutting paper
rigid handle for precise pressure control
low-friction axle for smooth rolling
unconventional_tools: small toy car with smooth plastic wheels
empty thread spool on a pencil
detached office chair caster wheel
opposite_tool_attributes: broad, flat, textured or sticky contact surface that does not roll
sharp, square, or serrated edges that can cut or tear the wallpaper
flexible/flimsy handle and a high-friction or fixed axle that drags instead of rolling

tasks.task_goal: Measure the length of a garden path accurately
tasks.expected_outcome: Distance reading is obtained with minimal error over uneven ground
required_tool_attributes: calibrated circular wheel with known circumference
treaded surface for traction and reduced slip
low-friction hub to ensure true rotational counts
rigid frame and counter linked to the axle
unconventional_tools: bicycle with calibrated cyclometer
wheeled suitcase (rolling luggage) using known wheel circumference and rotation count
skateboard or longboard rolled along the path with calibrated wheel circumference
opposite_tool_attributes: irregular, deformable wheel with unknown or variable circumference
smooth, treadless contact surface that slips on soil or grass
counter not mechanically linked to the axle (and/or a binding, high-friction hub)

tasks.task_goal: Self-massage tight calf muscles after running
tasks.expected_outcome: Muscle tension is reduced through controlled rolling pressure
required_tool_attributes: cylindrical geometry for smooth body contact
firm, resilient foam with rigid core
sufficient diameter to maintain curvature under load
high-friction exterior to prevent unwanted sliding
unconventional_tools: wooden rolling pin
stainless-steel water bottle with a silicone sleeve
pool noodle slid over a broomstick
opposite_tool_attributes: flat, flexible sheet-like geometry instead of a rigid cylinder
soft, collapsible material with no rigid core that deforms under body weight
slick, low-friction exterior that slides on skin or floor

tasks.task_goal: Compact a newly spread gravel driveway
tasks.expected_outcome: Gravel surface is densely compacted and evenly leveled
required_tool_attributes: heavy steel cylindrical drums for high contact pressure
powered rotation for continuous rolling
robust bearings for sustained load
smooth drum surface to avoid rutting
unconventional_tools: water-filled lawn roller
55-gallon steel drum filled with water or sand, fitted with a rod axle and towed
loaded pickup truck or SUV repeatedly driven over the surface
opposite_tool_attributes: lightweight, soft, or inflatable contact elements instead of heavy steel drums
no powered rotation or dragging contact instead of continuous rolling
rough, treaded, or spiked surface rather than a smooth drum

tasks.task_goal: Relocate a full 55-gallon drum across a warehouse
tasks.expected_outcome: The drum is transported safely and steadily to the new location
required_tool_attributes: swiveling caster wheels with precision bearings
low rolling resistance wheels sized for floor transitions
circular frame to cradle the drum securely
high load capacity and rigid construction
unconventional_tools: Heavy-duty furniture dolly paired with an old automotive tire as a drum cradle
Automotive wheel/skate dolly (vehicle positioning dolly)
Commercial trash can dolly (wheeled base for 44–55 gal bins)
opposite_tool_attributes: non-swiveling casters or seized bearings that prevent smooth turning
undersized, high-friction wheels (or no wheels) that snag on floor transitions
flat, non-circular, flexible frame with low load capacity that deforms under load

tasks.task_goal: Support and rotate a steel pipe during cutting
tasks.expected_outcome: Pipe turns smoothly for accurate, even cuts without binding
required_tool_attributes: V-head with freely spinning cylindrical rollers
bearings to minimize friction under axial load
height-adjustable, rigid stand for alignment
rollers compatible with round workpieces
unconventional_tools: Upside-down skateboard used as a rolling cradle
Bicycle roller trainer (indoor cycling rollers)
Pair of kitchen rolling pins arranged in a V cradle
opposite_tool_attributes: Flat, non-rotating head with high-friction or sticky surface instead of a V-head with freely spinning cylindrical rollers
No bearings or seized bearings that lock under axial load and prevent low-friction rotation
Non-adjustable, flexible, or unstable support that deforms or wobbles under load, preventing proper alignment

tasks.task_goal: Maneuver a boat trailer into a tight garage space by hand
tasks.expected_outcome: Trailer is precisely positioned without vehicle assistance
required_tool_attributes: large pneumatic wheel(s) for low rolling resistance
hitch ball interface for secure coupling
long handle for torque and control
sturdy axle and bearings for smooth rotation under tongue weight
unconventional_tools: Appliance hand truck with a hitch ball bolted to the toe plate
Two-wheeled wheelbarrow with a hitch ball mounted to the front cross brace
Hydraulic floor jack with a hitch ball fixed to the saddle
opposite_tool_attributes: small hard casters or solid non-pneumatic wheels with high rolling resistance
no hitch ball interface; unsecured friction or strap-only coupling
short, flexible handle that bends and provides little leverage or control

tasks.task_goal: Capture a smooth lateral tracking shot on a film set
tasks.expected_outcome: Footage is smoothly gliding without jitter or bounce
required_tool_attributes: precisely machined wheels with low-friction bearings
wheel profile matched to track radius for guided rolling
rigid platform to maintain camera stability
even weight distribution to prevent wheel slip
unconventional_tools: longboard skateboard
manual wheelchair
furniture moving dolly
opposite_tool_attributes: rough, high-friction or seized bearings with poorly machined wheels
wheel profile that mismatches the track geometry (e.g., flat/square wheels, wrong flange/taper)
flexible, non-rigid platform with uneven/top-heavy load that shifts during motion

tasks.task_goal: Transport clothes through an airport without carrying weight
tasks.expected_outcome: Suitcase moves easily alongside the traveler with minimal effort
required_tool_attributes: durable wheels with smooth bearings
aligned axles for straight rolling
rigid chassis to keep wheels true under load
extendable handle to apply forward force
unconventional_tools: rolling cooler with telescoping handle
baby stroller repurposed to carry clothes
skateboard with a duffel bag strapped on and a rope/leash as a pull handle
opposite_tool_attributes: fragile, high-friction wheels without smooth bearings
bent or misaligned axles that cause wobble and veering
no extendable handle (short or absent handle requiring lifting)

tasks.task_goal: Ink a linocut block evenly before printing
tasks.expected_outcome: A uniform ink layer is transferred to the block surface
required_tool_attributes: smooth cylindrical rubber roller
low-friction axle for consistent rotation
rigid frame and handle for steady pressure
solvent-resistant materials to maintain surface integrity
unconventional_tools: mini foam paint roller
silicone mini rolling pin
wallpaper seam roller (rubber J-roller)
opposite_tool_attributes: porous, irregular, non-cylindrical surface that absorbs ink instead of transferring it smoothly
seized or high-friction axle that prevents consistent free rotation
flexible, flimsy frame and handle that bend and cannot maintain steady pressure

tasks.task_goal: Set vinyl plank flooring by pressing adhesive uniformly
tasks.expected_outcome: Planks are fully bonded with no trapped air, ensuring flat installation
required_tool_attributes: heavy cylindrical segments to deliver even pressure
smooth roller surfaces to prevent marring
low-friction bearings for steady movement
rigid handle for controlled rolling force
unconventional_tools: Water-filled steel lawn roller
Loaded Olympic barbell (roll on bumper plates, using the bar as a handle)
Full beer keg rolled carefully with a towel wrap
opposite_tool_attributes: lightweight, deformable, non-cylindrical contact surface instead of heavy cylindrical segments
rough or abrasive contact surface instead of smooth rollers
high-friction/no bearings and a flexible/limp handle instead of low-friction bearings and a rigid handle

tasks.task_goal: Move mulch from driveway to garden beds
tasks.expected_outcome: Mulch is transported efficiently with reduced lifting strain
required_tool_attributes: large pneumatic wheel to roll over uneven ground
sturdy axle and bearings for smooth rotation under load
treaded tire for traction
rigid frame to keep wheel alignment
unconventional_tools: jogging stroller with pneumatic tires (seat lined with a tarp or bin)
wheelie trash bin (tilted and rolled like a cart)
all-terrain kids' wagon with air-filled treaded tires
opposite_tool_attributes: small, solid non-pneumatic wheel that cannot absorb bumps
no axle or loose bearings that wobble and bind under load
smooth, treadless tire that lacks traction
